raw_consumer_statement: I contacted American Express as I had checks deposited that they said were not valid. I told them to review the deposits and find where they came from as the payments from my account have already been posted. I had XXXX in debt on my card I was paying off and now they said I owe XXXX. I never made purchases that would increase my debt and I closed the account because I had a XXXX balance and now they demand I pay it all. They did not investigate or try to help at all. I have asked multiple times for it to be reviewed but all they want is XXXX immediately.
